title: Data Analyst
description: ServiceNow is the platform of choice for digital transformation across the Fortune 500. Our cloud-native workflow engine processes billions of transactions daily. As a Data Analyst, you'll extract insights from massive datasets driving product and business decisions.
responsibilities: Analyze product usage data to identify trends and patterns
Create reports and dashboards for business stakeholders
Perform ad-hoc data queries and investigations
Support metrics development and KPI tracking
Validate data quality and document data sources
Present findings and recommendations to leadership

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-3 years of data analysis, business intelligence, or analytics experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
